# CWE-268 — Privilege Chaining (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-268-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

var userRecords = map[string]string{"alice": "hash", "bob": "hash2"}

// Vulnerable: read plus export scopes together leak the full credential table.
func ExportDirectory(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	scopes := strings.Split(r.Header.Get("X-Scopes"), ",")
	hasRead, hasExport := false, false
	for _, s := range scopes {
		switch strings.TrimSpace(s) {
		case "read":
			hasRead = true
		case "export":
			hasExport = true
		}
	}
	if hasRead && hasExport {
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(userRecords)
		return
	}
	http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
}
